auth.login.title: Sign In
auth.login.description: Enter your credentials to access your account
auth.login.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
auth.forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we will send you a reset link
auth.forgotPassword.checkEmail.title: Check Your Email
auth.forgotPassword.checkEmail.descripti: We've sent a reset link to {email}
auth.forgotPassword.checkEmail.noEmail: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder or try again.
auth.forgotPassword.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.resetPassword.title: Reset Password
auth.resetPassword.description: Create a new password for your account. Make sure it's at least 8 characters.
auth.resetPassword.requirements.title: Password must contain:
auth.resetPassword.success.title: Password Reset Successfully
auth.resetPassword.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.magicLink.title: Magic Link
auth.magicLink.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a magic link to sign in instantly — no password needed.
auth.magicLink.success.title: Check Your Email
auth.magicLink.success.description: We've sent a magic link to {email}. Click the link in your email to sign in.
auth.magicLink.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
